phases_completed.summary: Repo skeleton: go.mod, .gitignore, cmd/ layout (4 binaries), internal/mappings/ scaffold, Makefile.

Mappings registry + migration tool. internal/mappings package with types/io/lookup/mutate/validate/path. cmd/migrate-legacy with read-env/read-legacy-cfg/write logic. 27 tests passing. Live smoke test on real legacy files works.
phases_completed.self_review: Aligned with locked spec v6. Atomic Write + backup-on-rewrite (.bak one generation, mode 0600). DefaultPath uses os.UserHomeDir() per R1 fix. Validate covers schema_version + group/channel integrity. migrate-legacy refuses to overwrite.

drift_log: Foundation plan Task 2.1 type definitions were written before spec R2/R3 fixes. Actual types in internal/mappings/types.go follow locked spec v6 (Codex top-level field, channel-level debounce_max_messages/fallback_cooldown_s/stt_prefix). Plan tasks 2.2+ followed locked spec — minor signature divergence from plan text, semantics align.
notes: Phase 1 + Phase 2 done. Next: write Plan 3 covering broker core + IPC (spec §4.2 + §4.4.1 + §4.2.2). After Plan 3 is written and reviewed, execute. Per Karthi's loop instruction, review codebase + direction at each phase boundary before proceeding.
